category.scope_note: Portable lithium batteries, battery cells, and power banks (China export to Angola) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Angola Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入安哥拉合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入安哥拉合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation and market-entry obligations against Angola (IANORQ-led) requirements: IANORQ conformity and import-inspection workflow, EN IEC 62133-based safety expectations, INACOM for wireless modules, UN 38.3 transport, and importer-led local compliance in Angola.
description.zh: 公共利益用途的中国锂电池/移动电源对比说明：结合安哥拉（由 IANORQ 牵头）要求，覆盖 IANORQ 体系内的合格评估与入境检验流程、EN IEC 62133 体系下的电芯安全参照、无线类 INACOM 要求、UN 38.3 运输，以及安哥拉本地进口商主导的市场准入。
description.zht: 公共利益用途的中國鋰電池/行動電源對比說明：結合安哥拉（由 IANORQ 牽頭）要求，涵蓋 IANORQ 體系內的合格評定與入境檢驗流程、EN IEC 62133 體系下的電芯安全參照、無線類 INACOM 要求、UN 38.3 運輸，以及安哥拉本地進口商主導的市場准入。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations and enforcement practice can change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not make legal, customs, or certification decisions.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规和执行实践可能变化，出口前请向有资质的法务和技术顾问核实全部要求。本页不作法律、海关或认证裁定。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規和執行實務可能變化，出口前請向有資質的法務和技術顧問核實全部要求。本頁不作法律、海關或認證裁定。

answer_first.en: For China-exported lithium batteries and power banks, Angola market entry is importer-led under IANORQ-focused conformity and customs-inspection expectations, with Portuguese documentation and local import channels. EU-style regimes such as EU RoHS, EU-style battery-passport obligations, and CE marking requirements are not directly equivalent in Angola.
answer_first.zh: 中国出口锂电池和移动电源进入安哥拉的关键特征是由当地进口商主导的 IANORQ 对应的合规与海关入境要求，并要求葡语文件和本地渠道。EU RoHS、EU 型电池护照和 CE 标志等欧盟式体系在安哥拉没有直接对应。
answer_first.zht: 中國出口鋰電池及行動電源進入安哥拉的關鍵特徵是由當地進口商主導的 IANORQ 對應合規與海關入境要求，並要求葡語文件及本地通道。EU RoHS、EU 型電池護照和 CE 標誌等歐盟式體系在安哥拉沒有直接對應。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Source-first draft; update when official IANORQ/INACOM notices or customs practice changes.
